## BuildMixedAuthoringSchemasOptions interface

Options for generating mixed-authoring schemas.

The `typeName` can resolve to a class, interface, or object type alias, just like `generateSchemas()`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface BuildMixedAuthoringSchemasOptions extends StaticSchemaGenerationOptions 
```
**Extends:** [StaticSchemaGenerationOptions](./build.staticschemagenerationoptions.md)
